name: Markus Schulz & Ørjan Nilsen
description:
MARKUS SCHULZ & ØRJAN NILSEN – VULKAN ARENA – FRIDAY OCT 23rd

BALANS invites you to an exclusive night at Vulkan Arena in Oslo featuring two of the biggest names in trance music – MARKUS SCHULZ & ØRJAN NILSEN!

Venue: Vulkan Arena, Oslo
Date: October 23rd
Time: 20:00 – 02:00
Age limit: 20+

About Markus Schulz
Markus Schulz is a global trance icon known for his powerful blend of progressive, trance and melodic sounds. With headline performances at the world's biggest festivals and a career spanning more than two decades, he has become one of the most influential names in electronic music.

About Ørjan Nilsen
Ørjan Nilsen is one of Norway’s most celebrated electronic artists, renowned for his uplifting melodies, energetic productions and electrifying live sets. His unique sound has made him a fan favorite on dance floors across the globe.

Secure your tickets now and experience an unforgettable night at Vulkan Arena, Oslo.
